p.c: function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = x0 ⊂ x1 }[T](a ∪ b, c ∪ d)
not a ∪ b ⊂ c ∪ d or forall(x0: T) { not x0 ∈ a ∪ b or x0 ∈ c ∪ d } = true
(forall(x0: T) { not (x0 ∈ a ∪ b and not x0 ∈ c ∪ d) or not a ∪ b ⊂ c ∪ d })
(forall(x0: T) { not (x0 ∈ a ∪ b and not x0 ∈ c ∪ d) })
(forall(x0: T) { not a ∪ b ⊂ c ∪ d or not x0 ∈ a ∪ b or x0 ∈ c ∪ d })
(forall(x0: T) { not x0 ∈ a ∪ b or x0 ∈ c ∪ d })
not forall(x0: T) { not x0 ∈ a ∪ b or x0 ∈ c ∪ d } or a ∪ b ⊂ c ∪ d

goal: is_subspace_separable[T](s) = exists(k0: Set[T]) { k0.subset(s) and is_countable[T](k0) and s.subset(closure[T](k0)) }

p.c: function[T0: TopologicalSpace](x0: Set[T0]) { exists(k0: Set[T0]) { k0 ⊂ x0 and is_countable[T0](k0) and x0 ⊂ closure[T0](k0) } = is_subspace_separable[T0](x0) }[T](s)
not exists(k0: Set[T]) { k0 ⊂ s and is_countable[T](k0) and s ⊂ closure[T](k0) } or is_subspace_separable[T](s)
(forall(x0: Set[T]) { not (x0 ⊂ s and is_countable[T](x0) and s ⊂ closure[T](x0)) or is_subspace_separable[T](s) })
(forall(x0: Set[T]) { not (x0 ⊂ s and is_countable[T](x0)) or not s ⊂ closure[T](x0) or is_subspace_separable[T](s) })

goal: is_subspace_separable[T](t) = exists(k0: Set[T]) { k0.subset(t) and is_countable[T](k0) and t.subset(closure[T](k0)) }

p.c: function[T0: TopologicalSpace](x0: Set[T0]) { exists(k0: Set[T0]) { k0 ⊂ x0 and is_countable[T0](k0) and x0 ⊂ closure[T0](k0) } = is_subspace_separable[T0](x0) }[T](t)
not exists(k0: Set[T]) { k0 ⊂ t and is_countable[T](k0) and t ⊂ closure[T](k0) } or is_subspace_separable[T](t)
(forall(x0: Set[T]) { not (x0 ⊂ t and is_countable[T](x0) and t ⊂ closure[T](x0)) or is_subspace_separable[T](t) })
(forall(x0: Set[T]) { not (x0 ⊂ t and is_countable[T](x0)) or not t ⊂ closure[T](x0) or is_subspace_separable[T](t) })

goal: exists(k0: Set[T]) { k0.subset(s) and is_countable[T](k0) and s.subset(closure[T](k0)) }
exists(k0: Set[T]) { k0.subset(t) and is_countable[T](k0) and t.subset(closure[T](k0)) }
exists(k0: Set[T]) { k0.subset(s.union(t)) and is_countable[T](k0) and s.union(t).subset(closure[T](k0)) }

p.c: function(x0: Set[T]) { not (x0 ⊂ s ∪ t and is_countable[T](x0) and s ∪ t ⊂ closure[T](x0)) }(d)
not (d ⊂ s ∪ t and is_countable[T](d)) or not s ∪ t ⊂ closure[T](d)
exists(k0: Set[T]) { k0 ⊂ s ∪ t and is_countable[T](k0) and s ∪ t ⊂ closure[T](k0) }
let w0: Set[T] satisfy { w0 ⊂ s ∪ t and is_countable[T](w0) and s ∪ t ⊂ closure[T](w0) }
w0 ⊂ s ∪ t and is_countable[T](w0)
function[T0: TopologicalSpace](x0: Set[T0]) { exists(k0: Set[T0]) { k0 ⊂ x0 and is_countable[T0](k0) and x0 ⊂ closure[T0](k0) } = is_subspace_separable[T0](x0) }[T](s ∪ t)
not exists(k0: Set[T]) { k0 ⊂ s ∪ t and is_countable[T](k0) and s ∪ t ⊂ closure[T](k0) } or is_subspace_separable[T](s ∪ t)
(forall(x0: Set[T]) { not (x0 ⊂ s ∪ t and is_countable[T](x0) and s ∪ t ⊂ closure[T](x0)) or is_subspace_separable[T](s ∪ t) })
(forall(x0: Set[T]) { not (x0 ⊂ s ∪ t and is_countable[T](x0)) or not s ∪ t ⊂ closure[T](x0) or is_subspace_separable[T](s ∪ t) })
